name: HivePing
description: Conversation-scoped mention bridge with configurable reasoning backend for Discord, Slack, and Microsoft Teams

openclawCommand.description: Command used for direct outbound reply delivery (for example: openclaw). If set to openclaw and missing, plugin tries openclaw-cli.

reasoningCommand.description: Optional override for the MCP server command used for repository reasoning. Defaults to codexCommand, then codex.

reasoningArgs.description: Arguments passed to the reasoning MCP server command. Defaults to ["mcp-server"].

reasoningToolName.description: MCP tool name invoked on the reasoning server. Defaults to codex.

bindingsFile.description: Relative path for persisted conversation bindings

runtimeConfigFile.description: File used by @hiveping config to persist managed runtime settings

allowedRoots.description: Optional list of allowed root paths for @hiveping bind

mentionHookEnabled.description: Enable @mention-based command handling via message hook

mentionAliases.description: Message aliases that trigger mention commands (example: @hiveping).

agents.description: Optional fixed agent profiles. Each profile can pin a mention alias to a repository and a home conversation key so shared channels can reuse project-specific context.

allowedChannels.description: Optional list of channel identifiers or names where this agent may be used. Matches against conversation keys, ids, and provider metadata such as channelName when available.

organizationName.description: Organization slug sent to the config API for RBAC decisions

configApiUrl.description: Full URL for POST /get-hiveping-config (enables API RBAC enforcement when set)

configApiToken.description: Optional bearer token for the config API Authorization header

configApiTimeoutMs.description: Config API request timeout in milliseconds

rolePolicyEnabled.description: Enable local JSON role policy enforcement per project

rolePolicyDir.description: Optional directory containing role-policy JSON files; when unset, defaults to <bound-repo>/.hiveping/policies

skillsFile.description: Optional skill routing file; when unset, defaults to <bound-repo>/.hiveping/skills.md

skillsMode.description: Skill routing mode: rules parses structured skills.md entries, agent asks the configured reasoning backend to interpret SKILLS.md semantically

approvalRequestsFile.description: File used to persist pending/approved/rejected write approval requests

changeSandbox.description: Sandbox used for approved code-change execution

changeApprovalPolicy.description: Approval policy used for approved code-change execution

actionWebhookUrl.description: Webhook URL invoked for approved external actions

actionWebhookToken.description: Optional bearer token for action webhook calls

actionWebhookTimeoutMs.description: Action webhook request timeout in milliseconds
